name: Knedleigh
recipeInstructions: Mix all ingredients together except matza meal, using one egg for each person. This will provide a generous amount of knedleigh per serving; you may adjust the quantity as desired. Gradually add matza meal until the mixture holds together lightly. Place in refrigerator for several hours to allow the mixture to set. Add only enough matza meal so that the balls can be formed easily. Wet your hands before shaping them and ensure they are not perfectly round. Drop into boiling soup or water. Prepare a simple broth using water and a soup cube, keeping it hot in a separate saucepan. Transfer the knedleigh into your main chicken soup pot just before serving to prevent excessive absorption of liquid.
